problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerBinding selects the first read-only worker path, but the selected path still needs a schema-backed lease preflight boundary. Without a dedicated preflight artifact, a later runtime path could confuse worker selection with dispatch admission and skip temporal lease evidence.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerLeasePreflight validates against the public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
ReadOnlyWorkerLeasePreflight binds read_only_repo_inspection to the existing TemporalLeaseWindowReceipt schema
runtime dispatch remains denied in Foundation Mode
fencing token, positive sequence, TrustedClock, worker mesh, and worker failure receipt refs are mandatory

focused tests cover valid, authority-drift, binding-mismatch, missing-temporal-controls, nonlocal-resource, dispatch-gate-drift, receipt-ref-drift, count-drift, CLI, malformed-payload, and SDLC artifact cases
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: the preflight is a contract artifact and not a live lease issuer
the selected worker path must remain read_only_repo_inspection
future runtime admission must require temporal lease evidence
worker failure receipt evidence remains mandatory on failure
effect-bearing follow-on dispatch still requires UAO, Phi_gov, life-meaning judgment where applicable, approval where required, recovery evidence, and verification
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: focused pytest receipt for validator behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
